name: Attack
description: Make an attack with a weapon in one of your hands.

name: Move
description: Choose to either move your Base Movement Speed, Dash, or stand up to end the Toppled condition on yourself.

name: Switch
description: Exchange the weapons in your hand for another on your person or next to you that isn't being worn or carried.

name: Hold Action
description: You may choose to hold one action point until a condition is met on the battlefield. You must declare what you are spending the action on and what the when you use the Hold Action. For example, you may wait until the enemy pops out from behind a barrel, or wait to run until an obstacle has cleared your path.

name: Gapple
description: Perform a Brawn Contest. If your target fails they are grappled by you and gain the grappled condition. This condition ends if you choose to end it or unwillingly move away from them. You can only grapple one target at once.

name: Catch Breath
description: Roll 1d10 + Grit regain that much lost Endurance.

name: Reload
description: Reload the ammunition of a Firearm.

name: Improved Blunt Attacks
description: Gain an additional +1 to attack for each rank in this class on all Blunt Weapons attacks.

name: Full Spin
description: While using a weapon with the Two-Handed property, you can make a 360-degree swing. Make an attack against each creature within your range. This action costs double the weapon's Endurance cost.

name: COMBO: Backhand Hit
description: After you make a successful attack, you can perform an additional attack to the same target. If this Backhanded hit is successful, perform a Brawn Contest and on a fail the target is staggered.

name: Crusher
description: All attacks made with a blunt weapon against a stone or metal object that isn't worn or carried automatically crits.

name: Joint Damage
description: Whenever you score a critical hit the target becomes Sprained for the next minute.

name: Power Slam
description: Make an attack against an opponent. If you hit, perform a Brawn Contest. If they fail, they are staggered, and all attacks against them are critical hits until the start of your next turn.

name: COMBO: Ground Pound
description: After you make a Full Swing attack, use can use this ability to slam the ground. Any creature you missed with your attack must make a Brawn Contest against you. All creatures that fail become toppled.

name: FINISHER: Bone Bash
description: You make a powerful strike strong enough to break bones. On a successful hit the target gains 3 stacks of the Sprained condition until they regain Health.

name: COMBO: Head Strike
description: After you successfully hit a Backhand Hit attack, you can use this ability to make a mighty blow against a target's head. When doing so you gain advantage on your attack and the target becomes toppled.

name: Natural Defense
description: Gain +1 Physical Toughness when wielding an armor or shield.

name: Unstoppable
description: You have trained to stay on your footing both in and out of combat. You have advantage on all checks that would topple you.

name: Relentless Adrenaline
description: If your health has been reduced since the end of your last turn, you can allow adrenaline to heal your wounds. You can spend 2 Endurance and regain 1d4 health up to the amount of damage taken.

name: Stand Ground
description: Until the start of your next turn, all attacks against you have disadvantage.

name: Superior Defense
description: It no longer costs Endurance to Brace with the shield.

name: Iron Body
description: You are immune to the Concussed, Staggered, or Winded conditions.

name: Improved Natural Defense
description: Your Physical Toughness now applies to all damage types.

name: FINISHER: Overrun
description: With a burst of adrenaline you push past your limits, charging forward and moving up to 12 meters in a straight line, moving up to your movement, and can make one free attack against each creature within your reach.

name: Improved Axe Attacks
description: Gain an additional +1 to attack for each rank in this class on all Axe Attacks.

name: Hatchet
description: All attacks made with an axe against wooden objects deal double damage

name: COMBO: Cross Attack
description: After you make an attack action on your turn and miss, you can perform a Cross Attack, making a second attack that follows along your initial slash but in the opposite direction. On a hit, you inflict the bleed condition until the start of your next turn.

name: Downward Strike
description: While using a weapon in both hands, you can make a large strike on a target's head, giving you an additional +1 to damage for each rank in this class.

name: Destructive Nature
description: Whenever you score a critical hit, the target gains the Bleeding condition until healed.

name: FINISHER: Executioner's Cleave
description: You swing with one massive slash. Make an attack roll with this weapon and on a hit, your target's toughness is halved and the armor gains the Damaged property. You become staggered after using this ability.

name: COMBO: Dismemberment
description: After you perform an attack that inflicted Bleed, you can perform another powerful chop, opening the wound further. On a successful hit, the target must make a DC 15 Grit roll or gain 2 additional stacks of the Bleed condition for 1 minute on a fail and 1 additional stack of the Bleed condition for 1 minute on a success.

name: Improved Firearm Attacks
description: Gain an additional +1 to attack for each rank in this class on all Hand-Firearm attacks

name: Trick Shot
description: When you make a ranged weapon attack, you can use a trick shot to ricochet your attack off and ignore a target's cover. When you do so, the damage from your weapon is halved.

name: Wide Eye
description: You have an eye for detail while in close quarters. You have advantage on all Awareness checks.

name: Quick Draw
description: Once per turn, when you switch weapons into a loaded firearm, you can make an attack for free.

name: Dodge Roll
description: Once per round, whenever you Dodge, you can move 1 meter.

name: Improved Reload
description: Whenever you use the reload action, you can reload two firearms instead of one.

name: FINISHER: Rapid Fire
description: You quickly and rapidly load and fire your Hand-Firearm easily. Use this ability to spend up to 3 action points on this turn. For each action point spent, you can attack it with advantage and reload instantly.

name: Improved Unarmed Attacks
description: Gain an additional +1 to attack for each rank in this class on all strike weapons.

name: Meditation
description: While training in martial arts, you also learned how to meditate to rapidly recover your Endurance. You regain an amount of Endurance equal to your rank in this class.

name: Trip
description: You know the art of quickly knocking creatures that are one size larger than you or smaller to their feet. Make an attack against a creature with legs, they gain the Toppled condition in addition to dealing damage.

name: COMBO: Knee Jab
description: After successfully landing an attack on a target within your reach, you can make an additional attack as an Unarmed Strike on the same target. On a successful attack, in addition to dealing damage, perform a Grit Contest and if the target fails they gain the Winded condition until the end of your next turn.

name: COMBO: Pin
description: After you successfully make a Trip attack, you can perform this combo to pin the target giving them the Grappled Condition.

name: Silent Step
description: Your footprints are silent. When you are walking you don't make a noise.

name: Flury
description: Once per turn, you can use this ability to attack with increased agility. Choose a target within your weapon's range; you can make 2 attacks against them.

name: COMBO: Central Blow
description: If the target of your attack has the Winded condition from a previous attack, you can make a central Strike attack on them. On a successful hit, in addition to dealing damage the target becomes Defenseless until the start of your next turn.

name: FINISHER: Nerve Attack
description: Whenever you perform a successful Pin attack, you can strike their Nerves. The target gains the Stunned Condition for one minute. At the end of the Target's turn they can make a Grit Contest to end the condition early.

name: Improved Firearm Attacks
description: Gain an additional +1 to attack for each rank in this class on all Sniper-Firearm attacks.

name: Eagle Eye
description: You have better eyesight, allowing you to make out details from further away. You can make out land masses and other ships from 20 meters away. Additionally, your range with sniper firearms increases by 2 meters for each rank in this class.

name: Aim
description: You can line up your shot with your ranged attacks to improve your accuracy. Your next attack made with a ranged weapon has advantage.

name: Defensive Range
description: Your knowledge of attacking from a great distance also helps you stay hidden. Whenever you have half cover, you gain an additional +1 to toughness against all non-melee attacks.

name: Perfect Precision
description: Whenever you score a critical hit, you always deal the maximum damage.

name: FINISHER: Deadshot
description: You can spend your turn to line up the perfect shot with your Sniper-Firearm. You can hold an attack without setting a condition. When you make your attack roll with this ability, roll three times and take the highest and lowest attack rolls on your target, dealing damage from both as if they were separate attacks if they hit.

name: Improved Polearm Attack
description: Gain an additional +1 to attack for each rank in this class on all Polearm attacks.

name: Keeping Distance
description: On your first successful attack with a polearm on your turn, you can forgo damage to reduce a target's Speed by 2 for their first move action on their next turn.

name: COMBO: Thrust
description: After you make a move action, you can make a powerful thrusting attack. Make an attack roll against your target. On a hit, in addition to taking damage they must make a Brawn Contest against you and on a fail will be knocked back 1 meter.

name: Firm Ground
description: When you use this ability, until the start of your next turn whenever a creature willingly enters your attack range for the first time on their turn, you can make an attack on them. After each consecutive attack with this ability you gain an additional -5 to hit, until the start of your next turn.

name: Extended Reach
description: All weapons (excluding strike weapons and ranged weapons) now have the reach property if they did not already.

name: Improved Keeping Distance
description: Whenever you use your “Keeping Distance” ability it now reduces the target's Speed to 0 for their next Move action on their turn.

name: FINISHER: Gaping Wound
description: Make 3 attacks rolls on up to 3 targets. On a hit, you create a large gaping wound, causing their Speed to be set to 0 until the end of your next turn.

name: Improved Sword Attacks
description: Gain an additional +1 to attack for each rank in this class on all Sword attacks.

name: Sword's Intuition
description: Knowledge of the weapons helps you perform perfect slices. Your melee attacks this round have advantage.

name: Duelist
description: Whenever you are fighting against a creature, and you and the creature do not have any allies within 5 feet, you deal an additional +2 damage on all Sword attacks.

name: Improved Parry
description: Whenever you use Parry an attack, it only costs you normal endurance cost, instead of double the endurance cost.

name: COMBO: X Slice
description: After you make an attack with a sword and you have a second melee weapon in your hand, you can make a second attack crossing the first to the same target. On a successful hit you can add the damage from Duelist even if you have allies around the target. If there are no allies around the target you deal the damage from Duelist twice.

name: Perfect Parry
description: Once per round, you can parry without spending the weapons Endurance Cost.

name: FINISHER: Edge Alignment
description: You change your footing to one of pure aggression. For the next 3 rounds you can parry without spending the weapons Endurance Cost. Additionally any of your attacks which are Parried do not have an additional Endurance Cost to attack again.

name: Recipes
description: For each rank you have in this class you learn one alcohol recipe or compound recipe from the list below.

name: Brew Concoctions
description: You can use ingredients to create a batch of an alcohol or compound. These compounds can either be enhancements or poisons. Your Poison DC is equal to 10 + your rank in this class.

name: Weapon Coating
description: You know how to coat weapons with poison. Take a poison you have in your inventory and dip this weapon or ammunition into the poison. On a hit, the poison is applied to the target.

name: Chemist's Resistance
description: You have advantage on all rolls from poisons or compounds.

name: Toxic Cloud
description: Your knowledge of toxic fumes allows you to make any of your poisons airborne as well. You can throw a vial of poison and scatter it in the air, releasing a puff of toxic smoke in a 1 meter radius. All creatures in this area become inflicted with this poison.

name: Defensive Coating
description: Your natural poison resistance allows you to apply a poison to your skin without it affecting you. Whenever a creature hits you with an attack within 1 meter of you, they become inflicted with this poison.

name: Toxic Blood
description: You are immune to the poison condition and take half damage from all poison damage.

name: Improved Toxicity
description: You can now coat your weapon with multiple poisons at the same time. It takes 1 action per poison applied.

name: Forge
description: Whenever you are working a forge you can craft a metal item whose worth is equal to the worth of the material it is made from.

name: Smith
description: You gain the ability to use smith's tools.

name: Polish
description: You are well versed in all forms of metal work. You can polish an old or rusted piece of equipment in order to remove any negative physical effects caused by the item's age.

name: Armor Analysis
description: If an opponent is wearing armor made, you can analyze its weaknesses. All weapons with Armor Breaker and Armor Piercing have advantage against that target until the end of your next turn.

name: Makeshift Forge
description: You can use your blacksmith tools to create and use a makeshift forge as if it was a normal forge. Making items in this way takes twice as long.
You have built up a resilience to extreme heats. You have advantage on all Weather Tolerance checks against heat and have a Toughness 1 against Fire damage.

name: COMB: Hammered Rhythm
description: After making a successful attack against a target, you can make an additional attack against the same target with the same weapon. This additional attack does not have an endurance cost.

name: Improved Forging
description: Whenever you are working a forge you can craft a metal item whose worth is equal to double the worth of the material it is made from.

name: Investigate Planks
description: You can inspect the wood of the ship for damage, allowing you to repair 2d10 of a ship’s hit points while not at a port.

name: Carpentry
description: You gain the ability to use carpenter's tools. You can carve trinkets from wood. The value of the trinket is equal to the value of the material it is made from.

name: Rapid Cover
description: You can use some of your scrap wood to create a barricade of half cover at a space in front of you.

name: Good Eye
description: You can analyze the planks in a 2 meter radius around you for weak spots. If you find one you can attack it as an additional action to do critical damage to a ship.

name: COMBO: Quick Repair
description: After you have successfully found a weak spot using the Good Eye ability, you can repair it. You must have two free hands to use this feature. Whenever you fix a spot it can no longer be used to do critical damage to a ship.

name: Sawdust Cloud
description: You pull out a large amount of sawdust from your bag and create a puff of obscuring fog in a 3 meter radius around you. All creatures within the area become Blinded and gain Full Cover. This has an Endurance cost of 3.

name: Perfect Carvings
description: The value of your carvings after you finish working on them is now double the cost of the material it is made from.

name: Splinter
description: Whenever you cause a stack of the Bleed condition, the target is affected for one additional round.

name: Cook
description: Using 2 charges from cooking supplies, you craft a meal for the crew. Each member who eats this food regains 3d4 hit points per rank in this class. A person can only receive these benefits once per day.

name: Cooking
description: You gain the ability to use cooking tools.

name: Knife Training
description: You gain the ability to use a knife as a Finesse based sword or strike weapon that deals 1d4 slashing damage with the concealed and thrown properties.

name: Stomach Resilient
description: Your iron gut makes you immune to the poison condition.

name: Firebreath
description: You take a swig of alcohol and take a torch to breath fire on all creatures in a 3 meter cone in front of you. They must make a Finesse Contest against you or take 2d6 Fire damage.

name: Experimental Cooking
description: You rapidly create a dish and feed it to all allies you can see within 4 meters. Roll a d6. On a 1, all targets become Intoxicated. On a 2-5, all creatures regain 1d4 Health. On a 6, all creatures regain 1d4 Health and 2d6 Endurance.

name: Devilishly Delicious
description: The healing received from eating your food is always the maximum possible roll and a creature's endurance is spent Endurance. A person can only receive these benefits once per day.

name: Laborer Resilience
description: Your affinity for strenuous labor has helped you toughen up against the world. You have advantage on all Brawn Contests.

name: Textile Crafting
description: You gain knowledge on how to use textile tools.

name: Planter Box
description: You can construct and tend to a number of planter boxes equal to your rank with this class, which must be tended to daily. After 2 weeks, you will receive 1d4 units of your planted ingredient daily.

name: Hem
description: You have the knowledge necessary to make and mend cloth of all nature.

name: Hard Worker
description: Reduce the Endurance cost of all actions you take by 1.

name: COMBO: Harvest
description: After you perform an attack, perform a Brawn Contest. On a success, reduce the Endurance cost of all attacks made on the target by 1 until the end of your next turn.

name: FINISHER- Haymaker
description: You perform a fast sideways unarmed strike at the head of your target. On a successful hit, they are unable to Parry or Dodge until the end of your next turn.

name: Master Worker
description: Reduce the Endurance cost of all actions you take by 2. This does stack with Hard Worker.
You have advantage on all fishing checks.

name: Boating
description: You have advantage on all Nausea checks involving sea sickness.

name: Knot Knowledge
description: You have a vast understanding of knots. While next to a target you can perform a Brawn Contest. If the target fails they are restrained. The restraint DC is equal to 10+your rank in this class.

name: Fishing Rod
description: You gain the ability to use a fishing rod as a Brawn-based polearm weapon that deals 1d6 bludgeoning damage with the two-handed, hooked, and reach property.

name: Hook
description: While wielding a fishing pole in combat, you cast a line onto an enemy you can see within 6 meters of you. Perform a Brawn Contest. If a target is restrained they automatically fail this Contest. If the target fails, they are moved 2 meters in a direction of your choice.

name: Bait
description: You know how to craft bait that lures fish to you using an additional charge. Whenever you throw this bait in the water, all creatures gain a +5 on Fishing check nearby for up to 1 hour.

name: Weathered
description: You have advantage on all Weather Tolerance roll.

name: Knot Expertise
description: Your knowledge of knots is even stronger than before. Whenever you restrain a creature they have disadvantage to break free.

name: Perfect Cast
description: You automatically succeed on all fishing checks whose difficulty is less than your total character level.

name: Net
description: You can use a net as a single-use weapon. The net covers a 2 meter by 2 meter square. When you use this finish you toss the net up to 4 meters away and all creatures become restrained. The restrain DC is 15 and they have disadvantage to break free.

name: Catching Ships
description: Whenever you perform the Tender Ship Action, reduce the cost by 2 SAP.

name: Craft Grenade
description: During your freetime you gain the ability to craft grenades. You learn one grenade recipe per rank in this class.

name: Improved Explosions
description: Increase the DC of the explosion ability by your rank in this class.

name: Explosion Resistance
description: Gain 2 toughness against grenades

name: Improved Fuse
description: You have better control over the fuses you time your grenades. Whenever you use the fuse ability on a grenade, choose a creature. The fuse will go off at the start of their next turn.

name: Explosive Response
description: Whenever you make a Finesse roll against the Explosion ability, you take no damage on a successful roll and half damage on a fail.

name: Improved Grenade Crafting
description: Whenever you use the Craft Grenades Freetime ability, you can craft 2 grenades for the same amount of charges and the same time.

name: FINISHER: Self Destruction
description: Using the scraps of supplies on you, you create an instantaneous explosion centered on yourself. All creatures in a 2 meter radius, including yourself, are hit with an Explosion (14) that deals 4d4 fire damage.

name: Explosive Weaponry
description: Whenever you perform the Fire Weapon Ship Action, reduce the cost by 2 SAP.

name: Create Trap
description: You can expend a number of charges to create a type of trap you are familiar with. You learn one trap type from the list below for each rank in this class. Whenever someone triggers your trap, they must make a save against your Trap DC, equal to 10 + Brains.
Choose a square within 1 meter of you. Choose a trap from your inventory and place it down. You can pick up a trap to move it as an additional action.

name: Tracker
description: You know how to track the movements of creatures while on land. You have advantage on all checks to track or determine a creature's direction

name: COMBO: False Trigger
description: After using the Place Trap ability, you can trigger the trap on a creature if you are both within 1 meter of the trap.

name: Improved Craft Traps
description: Whenever you use the Craft Trap ability, you can craft 2 traps for the same amount of charges.

name: Responsive Deployment
description: Whenever you start combat, you can place up to 3 traps instantly within 5 meters of yourself.

name: Religious Study
description: You have a strong understanding of different religions and what they believe. When you choose this class you and your GM must choose a Religion for you to follow.

name: Omen of Blessing
description: Gain a Blessing from the list of Blessings below. Some Blessings require you to follow a specific Religion or Doctrine in order to select it. You can apply a Blessing or Curse to a person you are with while not in combat. You can have up to 1 Blessing active at once.

name: Preach
description: Choose an enemy to condemn for their sins. Perform a Brains Contest. If they fail, they cannot target you with an attack for 1 minute. Whenever you deal damage to them they get to make this Contest again.

name: Omen of Blessing 2
description: Gain a second Blessing or Curse from the list of Blessings below. Additionally you may now have up to 2 Blessings or Curses active at once.

name: Give Praise
description: Choose an ally to give praise to. This ally must follow your religion. They gain a +3 bonus to their first attack roll made on their next turn.

You can give a sermon to denounce the powers of a non-religious Omen to all crew members following your religion. Make a Brains roll against the Omen DC. If you pass, the Omen will no longer affect your crew's Camaraderie.

name: Religious Confidence
description: You are immune to the Conversion and Preach abilities of Clergyman who do not follow your religion.

name: Omen of Blessing 3
description: Gain a third Blessing or Curse from the list of Blessings below. Additionally you may now have up to 3 Blessings or Curses active at once.

name: Quicken Heal
description: You regain 2 hit points for every hour they rest.

name: Medical Knowledge
description: You have an extensive understanding of the human body.

name: Bandage
description: You expend one use of a medical supply kit to heal a 1d6 Health on a target within your reach.

name: Sanitation
description: All creatures have advantage on rolls to prevent sickness or disease while you are on the crew.

name: Mend
description: You can help mend a resting sailor's broken bones, they regain 2 hit points for every hour they rest until they are at full health or are damaged.

name: Nursing
description: You help nurse a sick sailor's health. They have advantage on the roll to help them end the sickness.

name: Surgical Precision
description: Your medical knowledge can be used for more than just healing people. Whenever you deal piercing damage with a melee weapon, you also inflict your target with the Bleeding condition until the start of your next turn.

name: Masters of Death
description: You can blur the line between being alive and dead. If a creature within your reach has been reduced to 0 Health since the end of your last time, you can use this action to bring them back to life to an unconscious state. Once you use this ability on a creature, they must become fully healed before you are able to use this ability on them again.

name: Natural Reach
description: You have a deep understanding of different flora and fauna around you.

name: Forage
description: While on land, you can forage for different herbs that might be useful to you. Make a Brains roll, the DC based on the rarity of the herbs you are looking for.

name: Tame Animal
description: Your knowledge of animals allows you to understand what is necessary to tame a beast. You and your Sea Master agree on a creature to act as your pet. Some suggested animals are a bird, a cat, a dog, or a fish.

name: Command Beast
description: You can command a beast you have previously tamed on your turn, allowing you to control it in combat after your turn is over.

name: Animal Identification
description: You can quickly identify any beast you see, allowing you to identify any weaknesses it might have.

name: Veterinary Studies
description: You understand the medical needs of beasts which you have tamed.

name: Improved Beast Command
description: Whenever you take the Command Beast action, you can command the orders you command last for 2 rounds. You can control it in combat after your next turn is over as well without an additional action.

name: Nature's Wrath
description: You can command any beast that is not currently hostile against you, allowing you to control it in combat after your turn is over.

name: Perfect Practice
description: You gain the ability to play a musical instrument, sing, or learn a new dance of your choice each time you gain a rank in this class.

name: Musical Theory
description: You have a lucrative understanding of music theory and know how to write songs.

name: Distractive Presence
description: Choose a creature that can hear and see you. Perform a Brains Contest. If they fail, they gain the alarmed condition until the end of their next turn.

name: Calming Melody
description: Choose a creature that can hear and see you. They gain the calm condition until the end of their next turn.

name: Rally Anthem
description: Choose a number of creatures equal to your Brains score that can hear and see you. Reduce the Endurance cost of their next action by 3.

name: Fancy Footwork
description: Dodging costs you 2 less Endurance.

name: Demeaning Anthem
description: Choose a creature that can hear and see you. Perform a Brains Contest. If they fail, increase the Endurance cost of their next action by 3.

name: Sweet Lullabies
description: You play a sweet melody capable of putting even the largest of beasts to sleep. Any creature that can hear you and is below a quarter of their health must perform a Brains Contest. If they fail, they gain the winded condition until you stop playing. If they already have the winded condition from a different ability, they instead fall unconscious for 1 hour or until they are awoken or take damage.

name: Party Hard
description: Each night you can host a party with your crew. Your crew gains 1 Camaraderie for each crew member that participates in your party.

name: Superior Movement
description: You are immune to any ability that lowers your movement through a square.

name: Nautical Knowledge
description: You have a considerable understanding of how to read all types of nautical charts.

name: Calculate Location
description: You are able to analyze the stars, sun, and nearby islands to determine your precise location on a nautical map.

name: Chart a Course
description: Your knowledge of nautical charts allows you to follow a map to a location

name: COMBO: Exploted Opportunity
description: Whenever you use the move action, you can create a moment of opportunity, allowing one of your ally's to move up to their base movement on your turn as well.

name: Improved Speed
description: You gain an additional 2 meters of base movement on the first Move action of your turn.

name: Cartographer
description: Your knowledge of nautical charts now extends to making maps as well. You can now make a nautical map of your current location, allowing other navigators to chart a course here.

name: Ship Control
description: Whenever you perform the Turn or Adjust Rigging Ship Action, reduce the cost by 2 SAP.

name: Linguist's Education
description: You know and understand the art of language very well. Each time you gain a rank in this class you learn a new language.

name: Good Negotiator
description: You have advantage on all negotiation checks.

name: Natural Leader
description: You can give a command to your allies, improving their coordination and their ability to work together until the end of your next turn. You learn one command for each rank in this class from the list below.

name: Take Charge
description: Improve your rolls for Ship Action Points by 1.

name: Historic Bloodline
description: Your noble heritage did not just come with an education. Your name carries a reputation based on the circles you travel in.

name: Inspiring
description: Improve your rolls for Ship Action Points by an additional 1.

name: True Captain
description: Whenever you roll for Ship Action Points, if your roll is 4 or less, change the roll to be 5.

name: Strong Leader
description: Your Ship's Camaraderie cannot fall lower than 0 - the number of total crew members.
